context:
[newsapi | 2026-03-12] NimbusPay confirms ransomware attack; ~1.2M customer records exfiltrated
NimbusPay disclosed on 12 March 2026 that attackers encrypted internal systems and exfiltrated roughly 1.2 million customer records including KYC documents.

[nvd | 2025-11-02] CVE-2025-40881: unauthenticated SQL injection in HydraCRM Server
CVE-2025-40881 allows unauthenticated SQL injection in HydraCRM Server, CVSS 9.8. Affects versions through 4.2.1.

[newsapi | 2026-05-01] OrbitLedger investigates credential-stuffing incident affecting merchant dashboard
[nvd | 2026-04-18] CVE-2026-11902: improper access control in OrbitLedger API, CVSS 8.1.

[newsapi | 2026-06-20] MarketBloom wins 2026 SaaS Marketing Award and opens new Pune office
MarketBloom announced a new office in Pune and hiring plans for its sales team.

[nvd | 2026-02-10] CVE-2026-20551: path traversal in PineVault Backup Agent, CVSS 7.5.
[newsapi | 2026-07-11] QuantumEdge Ltd reports record Q1 results; total income up 97% YoY. QuantumEdge is a separate cybersecurity firm listed on the NSE.

[newsapi | 2026-06-30] TideBank references a 'security incident' in customer email
TideBank sent customers an email referencing a 'recent security incident' but disclosed no details on scope, cause, or records affected.
[nvd | 2022-08-15] CVE-2022-30190: remote code execution in Fernshop Commerce plugin, CVSS 9.3. Still unpatched in EOL versions.

[newsapi | 2026-06-05] CedarHR warns staff after targeted phishing campaign harvested employee credentials
CedarHR confirmed a phishing campaign led to compromised employee logins; it forced a password reset across the org.

[newsapi | 2026-07-01] GlideDocs launches AI writing assistant and raises Series B
GlideDocs announced a new AI feature and a $40M Series B round led by a growth fund. No security matters mentioned.

[newsapi | 2026-06-22] MapleClinic notifies patients after billing vendor breach exposed records
MapleClinic said a third-party billing provider was breached, exposing patient billing data. MapleClinic's own systems were not directly compromised.
[nvd | 2026-05-19] CVE-2026-33417: deserialization of untrusted data in AtlasQueue Broker, CVSS 9.1. Remote code execution possible pre-auth.

[newsapi | 2026-07-02] IronLedger confirms ransomware group leaked stolen finance data
IronLedger acknowledged a ransomware group published internal financial documents after the company declined to pay. Operations partially disrupted.

[newsapi | 2026-06-11] SafeHarbor achieves ISO 27001 certification
SafeHarbor announced it completed ISO 27001 certification, highlighting its investment in security controls. No incidents or vulnerabilities were reported.

[newsapi | 2026-06-28] PolarBank says it is 'investigating unusual account activity'
PolarBank told customers it is investigating 'unusual activity' on some accounts but has not confirmed a breach, cause, or number of accounts affected.

[nvd | 2026-03-30] CVE-2026-24118: SSRF in DriftKit Connector, CVSS 8.6.
[newsapi | 2026-07-05] Unrelated firm ZenPayroll Inc closes $200M Series D at a $3B valuation. ZenPayroll is not affiliated with DriftKit.

[newsapi | 2026-05-14] Brightwell discloses data breach affecting 300,000 users
[nvd | 2026-05-02] CVE-2026-29740: authentication bypass in Brightwell Portal, CVSS 8.8.

[newsapi | 2021-09-10] GraniteMart suffered a data breach exposing 80,000 customer emails in 2021
GraniteMart disclosed the 2021 incident; no evidence it has since improved its posture.

[newsapi | 2026-06-18] VelvetApps appoints new Chief Revenue Officer
VelvetApps announced a new CRO to lead its go-to-market expansion. No security-related content.

[newsapi | 2026-06-09] CobaltHR investigates insider data leak of employee salary records
CobaltHR confirmed a former employee exfiltrated internal salary and PII records before departing.
[nvd | 2026-04-22] CVE-2026-31880: XXE injection in Larkspur Analytics Suite, CVSS 7.9. Larkspur Analytics is a separate company; the advisory does not mention Larkfield.

[newsapi | 2026-05-27] Regulator fines NorthGate for failing to protect customer data
A data-protection regulator fined NorthGate after finding inadequate security controls led to unauthorized access to customer records.
[nvd | 2026-06-01] CVE-2026-30655: stored XSS in PixelForge Admin Console, CVSS 6.1. Requires authenticated user.
[nvd | 2026-06-15] CVE-2026-32210: a compromised npm dependency shipped in TrailMesh Agent introduces a backdoor, CVSS 9.4.

[newsapi | 2026-07-08] AmberDesk resets passwords after phishing compromise of support staff
AmberDesk confirmed attackers phished support employees and accessed an internal ticketing tool; it reset credentials and is reviewing access logs.

[newsapi | 2026-06-25] QuillSoft to be acquired by a private equity firm for $500M
QuillSoft announced a definitive agreement to be acquired. The release focuses on deal terms and growth plans; no security matters.

[newsapi | 2026-07-03] StreamForge hit by large DDoS attack causing multi-hour outage
StreamForge confirmed a distributed denial-of-service attack knocked its platform offline for several hours; no data exfiltration reported.
